title: heterotheca cinerascens
intro: Heterotheca cinerascens, also known as gray false goldeneye, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Heterotheca cinerascens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and provide relief from pain and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used externally to soothe skin conditions or internally to support overall health and well-being.
